channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in PHP (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in PHP nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🐘 paid-tw/skills (199 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: paid-tw

📝 Repository: paid-tw/skills

📄 Descrizione: 台灣第三方金流 Skills for AI Agents - 藍新金流、綠界科技 ECPay、統一金流 PAYUNi

⭐ Stelle: 199

🍴 Forks: 16

💻 Linguaggio: PHP

🏷️ Topics: payment-integration payments skills taiwan

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-01-22T04:40:14Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-02-13T17:14:15Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🐘 xhadmincn/FastMovieAI (124 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: xhadmincn

📝 Repository: xhadmincn/FastMovieAI

📄 Descrizione: FastMovieAI 是一个功能完整的开源短剧/短视频创作平台，采用前后端分离架构，提供 AI 驱动的视频内容创作能力。平台集成了用户管理、支付系统、内容管理、视频生成等完整功能模块，适合内容创作者和视频制作团队使用。

⭐ Stelle: 124

🍴 Forks: 41

💻 Linguaggio: PHP

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-01-22T09:03:32Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-02-19T06:39:54Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🐘 Yuva1117/Smart-Attendance-Web-App (51 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Yuva1117

📝 Repository: Yuva1117/Smart-Attendance-Web-App

📄 Descrizione: **Smart Attendance Web App** is a simple web-based system that helps teachers manage student attendance digitally. It allows an admin to add students, mark daily attendance as present or absent, and view attendance records. This system reduces paperwork, saves time, and ensures accurate attendance management using a database

item.title: 🐘 sowailem/FieldGuard (34 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: sowailem

📝 Repository: sowailem/FieldGuard

📄 Descrizione: FieldGuard is a Laravel package that enforces field-level security on Eloquent models, allowing fine-grained control over who can view or modify specific attributes—perfect for role-based data protection without altering your core models.

⭐ Stelle: 34

🍴 Forks: 2

💻 Linguaggio: PHP

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-01-27T07:21:35Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-02-16T06:48:55Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🐘 dknauss/wp-sudo (32 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: dknauss

📝 Repository: dknauss/wp-sudo

📄 Descrizione: Sudo for WordPress. 🥪 Dangerous actions — activating plugins, deleting users, changing critical settings — are gated by a required reauthentication step, regardless of user role. Time-bounded sessions, 2FA support, rate limiting, and configurable policies for REST, WP-CLI, Cron, and XML-RPC. No role escalation, no new permissions — just a gate. ⛩️

⭐ Stelle: 32

🍴 Forks: 2

💻 Linguaggio: PHP

🏷️ Topics: access-control capabilities least-privilege principle-of-least-privilege sudo user wordpress wordpress-admin-backend wordpress-admin-panel wordpress-administrators wordpress-multisite-compatible wordpress-plugins wordpress-security wordpress-security-plugin wordpress-users zero-trust

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-11T01:48:12Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-02-24T18:27:32Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
